requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — Brunei DES and NSC Context
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——文莱DES及NSC背景
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——汶萊DES及NSC背景

summary.en: Brunei has not published a bespoke national EMC Technical Regulation specifically for solar PV inverters. IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions) represent the international EMC baseline expected by DES technical reviewers and project engineers for grid-connected PV inverters in Brunei. NSC (National Standards Centre) handles national standards adoption in Brunei under DEPS (Department of Economic Planning and Statistics) and may adopt IEC or ASEAN-harmonised standards; however, as of 2026-06-14, no confirmed published mandatory EMC conformity assessment scheme specifically for solar PV inverters has been identified. In the absence of a published national mandatory scheme, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is the prudent approach for DES project submission and project-owner procurement specifications.
summary.zh: 文莱尚未发布专门针对太阳能光伏逆变器的国家EMC技术法规。IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——谐波电流排放限值）是文莱DES技术审查人员和项目工程师对并网光伏逆变器期望的国际EMC基准。NSC（国家标准中心）在DEPS（经济规划与统计局）下负责文莱的国家标准采纳，可能采纳IEC或东盟协调标准；但截至2026-06-14，尚未发现专门针对太阳能光伏逆变器的已确认的强制EMC合格评定计划。在缺乏已发布的国家强制性计划的情况下，来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2测试证据是提交DES项目和项目业主采购规格的稳健做法。
summary.zht: 汶萊尚未發佈專門針對太陽能光伏逆變器的國家EMC技術法規。IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——諧波電流排放限值）是汶萊DES技術審查人員和項目工程師對併網光伏逆變器期望的國際EMC基準。NSC（國家標準中心）在DEPS（經濟規劃與統計局）下負責汶萊的國家標準採納，可能採納IEC或東盟協調標準；但截至2026-06-14，尚未發現專門針對太陽能光伏逆變器的已確認的強制EMC合格評定計劃。在缺乏已發佈的國家強制性計劃的情況下，來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2測試證據是提交DES項目和項目業主採購規格的穩健做法。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (international EMC baseline for PV inverters; expected by Brunei project engineers)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (international harmonic emission baseline)
NSC (National Standards Centre, Brunei) — national standards adoption body under DEPS / Ministry of Finance and Economy; no confirmed mandatory EMC scheme for PV inverters as of 2026-06-14
ASEAN harmonised standards framework — Brunei as an ASEAN member may adopt harmonised IEC-based EMC standards; confirm with NSC

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods also reflected in China's domestic standards, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Brunei project submissions or international project-owner procurement specifications.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了中国国内标准中也有体现的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调。仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被接受为文莱项目提交或国际项目业主采购规格的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了中國國內標準中也有體現的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調。僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被接受為汶萊項目提交或國際項目業主採購規格的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy the IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence expected by DES Brunei technical reviewers and project owners. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. Where harmonics test results were obtained under Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V), confirm with the DES or project engineer whether retesting under Brunei grid conditions (230/400 V, 50 Hz) is required. Additionally, confirm with NSC whether any national mandatory EMC conformity assessment scheme applies to imported solar PV inverters in Brunei, as this is unconfirmed in published sources as of 2026-06-14.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足文莱DES技术审查人员和项目业主对IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2证据的期望。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。若谐波测试结果在中国电网条件（220/380 V）下取得，应向DES或项目工程师确认是否需要在文莱电网条件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新测试。此外，请向NSC确认是否有适用于文莱进口太阳能光伏逆变器的国家强制EMC合格评定计划，因为截至2026-06-14，该事项在已发布来源中尚未得到确认。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足汶萊DES技術審查人員和項目業主對IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2證據的期望。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。若諧波測試結果在中國電網條件（220/380 V）下取得，應向DES或項目工程師確認是否需要在汶萊電網條件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新測試。此外，請向NSC確認是否有適用於汶萊進口太陽能光伏逆變器的國家強制EMC合格評定計劃，因為截至2026-06-14，該事項在已發佈來源中尚未得到確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 are the expected international EMC evidence for DES project review and project-owner procurement; no confirmed published mandatory national EMC scheme specifically for PV inverters in Brunei as of 2026-06-14; confirm with NSC
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

source.publisher: Department of Economic Planning and Statistics (DEPS), Ministry of Finance and Economy, Brunei Darussalam (parent department of NSC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Brunei PV projects. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model. Confirm whether Brunei grid voltage conditions (230/400 V) require retesting compared to Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V). Confirm with NSC whether any mandatory EMC conformity assessment scheme applies to imported solar PV inverters in Brunei — this is unconfirmed in published sources as of 2026-06-14. Source URL verified as DEPS homepage only; NSC contact and specific requirements must be confirmed directly.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不被接受为文莱光伏项目的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。请从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。确认文莱电网电压条件（230/400 V）是否需要相较于中国电网条件（220/380 V）重新测试。向NSC确认文莱进口太阳能光伏逆变器是否适用强制EMC合格评定计划——截至2026-06-14，该事项在已发布来源中尚未得到确认。来源URL仅验证为DEPS主页；NSC联系方式及具体要求须直接确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不被接受為汶萊光伏項目的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。請從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。確認汶萊電網電壓條件（230/400 V）是否需要相較於中國電網條件（220/380 V）重新測試。向NSC確認汶萊進口太陽能光伏逆變器是否適用強制EMC合格評定計劃——截至2026-06-14，該事項在已發佈來源中尚未得到確認。來源URL僅驗證為DEPS主頁；NSC聯繫方式及具體要求須直接確認。
